prompt: Quick audit on the costs feature — anything broken or sketchy?

assertions.text: Output uses the 4-category structure (Architecture, State Management, Lifecycle & Memory, Performance & Stability)
Output cites at least one .kt file path containing 'cost' or 'Cost' (i.e. it actually reviewed costs feature files)

Output does not flag findings in unrelated features — no file:line citations for chat/, garage/, auth/, reminder/, profile/, onboarding/, settings/, splash/, or home/ feature files (mentioning them in passing context is OK; actionable findings against them is not)
